description_en: Santiago may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 17 halal restaurants and 4 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Santiago, Chile, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Santiago: 22 halal restaurants listed, 4 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
